trigger.description: Running `ee status --json` or `ee doctor --json` on macOS, Windows, or any non-Linux host. The NUMA-aware snapshot pinning optimization needs `mbind` / `MAP_POPULATE`, which Linux is the only platform to expose; every other platform falls through to the safe-by-construction heap deserialization path and surfaces this code so an operator sees the expected fallback at a glance.

expected_emission.repair_string: Run ee on a Linux multi-socket host to enable NUMA-aware snapshot pinning; on this platform the loader falls back to heap-only deserialization with no functional regression.
